user_prompt: A sleek autonomous delivery drone flies through a foggy industrial harbor at dawn. Same drone across all scenes. No humans. Cinematic realism. Smooth continuous camera motion. Scene 1 establishes, Scene 2 shows the mechanism (thrusters/rotors), Scene 3 shows arrival and landing. No text, no logos.

style_bible.visual_style: cinematic realism with detailed textures and atmospheric fog, emphasizing industrial harbor elements and drone design
style_bible.camera_rules: smooth continuous camera motion outside the drone, no sudden cuts or jumps, maintain clear visibility of drone and environment
style_bible.lighting_rules: soft dawn light with cool blue and warm orange tones, diffused through fog to create depth and mood
style_bible.continuity_rules: primary subject and environment remain consistent across scenes, lighting and fog conditions coherent, camera movement flows naturally between shots

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: Establish the sleek autonomous delivery drone flying through a foggy industrial harbor at dawn.

GLOBAL CONTINUITY (state carried across scenes):
- primary subject: sleek autonomous delivery drone
- environment: foggy industrial harbor at dawn
- explanatory state:
  - Scene 1: baseline condition (observation)

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: wide shot with drone centered slightly left
- lens: 35mm
- camera movement: slow dolly forward
- subject & action: drone enters frame from right, flying steadily through low-hanging fog
- environment details: rusted cranes, docked cargo ships, misty water surface
- lighting: soft diffused dawn light from left, cool blue ambient with warm highlights
- cinematic look: high contrast with shallow depth of field on drone, background softly blurred

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: medium shot, drone slightly right
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: slow pan left following drone
- subject & action: drone glides past industrial structures, fog swirling gently around rotors
- environment details: weathered shipping containers, steel beams, faint harbor lights
- lighting: warm orange glow from distant lamps contrasts with cool fog
- cinematic look: naturalistic colors, subtle film grain

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: close medium shot, drone front-left angle
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: slow tilt down as drone moves forward
- subject & action: drone steady flight with thrusters visible but inactive, fog thickening
- environment details: dock edge, water reflections, silhouetted cranes
- lighting: soft backlight highlights drone edges
- cinematic look: crisp focus on drone, atmospheric depth

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch, people, human, face, hands, cockpit
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch, people, human, face, hands, cockpit
scenes.camera: smooth dolly and pan outside drone, maintaining steady framing and natural motion
scenes.audio_cue: Here we see a sleek autonomous delivery drone flying through a foggy industrial harbor at dawn, setting the scene for how it navigates this complex environment.

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: Reveal the drone's propulsion mechanism with visible thrusters and rotors interacting with the foggy air.

GLOBAL CONTINUITY (state carried across scenes):
- primary subject: sleek autonomous delivery drone
- environment: foggy industrial harbor at dawn
- explanatory state:
  - Scene 2: mechanism revealed (cause)

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: close-up on drone's rotors from side angle
- lens: 85mm
- camera movement: slow pan across rotors
- subject & action: rotors begin spinning, fog swirling dynamically around blades
- environment details: faint harbor structures blurred in background
- lighting: soft side light emphasizing rotor blades and fog interaction
- cinematic look: crisp details with slight motion blur on blades

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: medium shot, drone angled front-right
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: slow dolly backward revealing full drone body with thrusters activating
- subject & action: thrusters emit subtle exhaust plumes, fog visibly displaced by airflow
- environment details: steel dock pillars, misty water surface
- lighting: warm glow from thrusters contrasts with cool ambient fog
- cinematic look: realistic particle effects, natural color grading

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: medium close-up from below, showing underside thrusters and airflow
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: slow tilt up following airflow patterns
- subject & action: airflow visualized as translucent streams pushing fog downward and backward
- environment details: dock floor faintly visible through fog
- lighting: soft ambient light with highlights on airflow streams
- cinematic look: clear visualization of cause-effect airflow dynamics

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch, people, human, face, hands, cockpit
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch, people, human, face, hands, cockpit
scenes.camera: slow pans and dollies emphasizing rotor and thruster details from outside the drone
scenes.audio_cue: The drone's rotors and thrusters generate powerful airflow, visibly disturbing the fog as they create the lift and thrust needed for flight.

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: Show the drone arriving and landing smoothly on the dock, demonstrating the effect of its propulsion and control.

GLOBAL CONTINUITY (state carried across scenes):
- primary subject: sleek autonomous delivery drone
- environment: foggy industrial harbor at dawn
- explanatory state:
  - Scene 3: outcome explained (effect)

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: wide shot of dock area with drone approaching from left
- lens: 35mm
- camera movement: slow tracking shot following drone
- subject & action: drone descends steadily toward landing pad, fog shifting with rotor wash
- environment details: dock surface, moored boats, cranes in background
- lighting: soft dawn light with warm highlights on drone
- cinematic look: balanced contrast, naturalistic depth

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: medium shot, drone close to landing pad
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: slow dolly in as drone lowers
- subject & action: drone slows rotors, stabilizes, fog gently settling
- environment details: textured dock surface, scattered industrial equipment
- lighting: warm glow from rising sun, subtle shadows
- cinematic look: crisp focus on drone, soft background blur

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: close-up on drone landing gear touching dock
- lens: 85mm
- camera movement: static hold
- subject & action: drone lands smoothly, rotors slow to stop, fog clearing around it
- environment details: dock edge, water reflections
- lighting: soft ambient light with golden hour warmth
- cinematic look: intimate, detailed realism

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch, people, human, face, hands, cockpit
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch, people, human, face, hands, cockpit
scenes.camera: tracking and dolly shots outside drone, ending with static close-up on landing
scenes.audio_cue: As the drone approaches and lands smoothly on the dock, we see how its propulsion and control systems enable precise delivery even in challenging foggy conditions.
